sheet_name: แปลนหลังคา
view_title: แปลนหลังคา
grid_source: mk_test/t3/บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01_หน้า00_gridline.json

element.grid_ref: covers grid1-3 x gridA-D plus overhangs
element.description: หลังคาเหล็กรีดลอน (corrugated metal sheet roofing) shown hatched over the whole plan; two 'SLOPE 6°' labels printed vertically on the two roof faces indicating fall direction/pitch (approx. 6 degrees).

warnings: This is the roof-plan half of sheet A-04; the floor-plan half is in sibling file _หน้า06_floor_plan.json.
The 'SLOPE 6°' labels are more legible in this read than a hand-annotated guess would suggest — printed as 'SLOPE 6*' twice on the two roof faces, read with medium-high confidence.

Actual roof framing (purlins, rafters/trusses) is not detailed on this sheet — it references 'โครงหลังคา ดูแบบวิศวกรรมโครงสร้าง' consistent with the S-01~S-08 sheets (pages 16-23), outside this extraction's page range.
Independent read done first, then cross-checked against t2's หน้า06_roof_plan.json — same overhang dimensions and slope reading, no disagreement found.
